title: Governor Hochul Announces More Than $11 Million Awarded to Clean Hydrogen Research and Development Projects
content: Governor Kathy Hochul announced more than $11 million has been awarded to five clean hydrogen research and development projects. The awarded projects will demonstrate new technology designs, cost reductions associated with clean hydrogen storage and distribution, evaluate large-scale clean hydrogen storage opportunities, and deploy zero-emission hydrogen-powered transportation. The announcement helps to address key barriers to the wider adoption of clean hydrogen as a potential solution to decarbonize industrial processes, hard-to-electrify sectors, such as transportation, and for grid support in the Stateâ€™s energy transition.
author: Analysts Account
